colors.name: screen-black
colors.role: background — the screen with the lamp off; every gray in the reel is derived from it

colors.name: abyss
colors.role: letterbox bars, the frame surround, the credits stage — darker than the screen so the picture reads as lit

colors.name: bone
colors.role: primary text, the envelope line of the score, the disc in shot B (15.5:1 on screen-black)

colors.name: bone-dim
colors.role: secondary text — bone at 64% alpha composited over screen-black (6.6:1); Korean glosses, captions, HUD

colors.name: signal-red
colors.role: the accent: cue dots, focus ring, selection, the struck cue's spine, THE END, the strings-entry mark (4.0:1 — large type and non-text only, never body text)

colors.name: tungsten
colors.role: warm metadata — slug lines, timecodes, credit roles, the oscilloscope ghost (5.6:1)

colors.name: hairline
colors.role: decorative rules — bone at 14% alpha over screen-black; never carries text

fonts.role: the title card and section display — condensed capitals, one weight
prose voice: screen directions, cue notes, program copy (300/400/500 + italic)
the machine: timecodes, frame counters, cue sheet leaders, credit roles
every Hangul glyph — the Korean line is a serif voice of its own, reached by stack fallthrough and pinned by :lang(ko)

texture: Two grains, both procedural. DOM: an SVG feTurbulence data-URI tile (baseFrequency 0.8, desaturated) over the hero at 7% opacity, jumped between five fixed offsets by a steps(1) transform at ~0.26s per position — frames of stock, not drifting smoke. Canvas: a 160px pre-rendered speck tile (bright specks above the 0.82 hash band, dark below 0.16) composited with globalCompositeOperation 'overlay' at 0.45 alpha and re-offset at ~12fps, under a per-frame hashed wear pass (scratches that live ~3 frames, 0–3 dust motes) and a radial vignette to 62% black. All grain motion dies under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: ease-out-cine
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) — reveals: fast in, long tail

motion.name: gate-weave
motion.value: 7.3s steps(1, end) infinite; nine positions, all within ±0.7px x / ±0.9px y

motion.name: char-rise
motion.value: 700ms ease-out-cine per glyph, translateY(0.35em) → 0, 55ms stagger from 220ms

motion.name: cue-blink
motion.value: 8.1s cycle; two ~0.7% dips to 0.15 opacity near the reel change

motion.name: grain-step
motion.value: 1.3s steps(1, end) infinite across five offsets (DOM); 83ms re-seed (canvas, ~12fps)

motion.name: scrub-lerp
motion.value: 0.12 per 60fps-normalized frame — the reel trails the scroll like real film mass

motion.name: reel-dissolve
motion.value: shot A → shot B smoothstepped over scroll progress 0.45–0.60

motion.name: reveal
motion.value: 600ms ease-out-cine, translateY(18px) → 0, 70ms stagger per observer batch

motion.name: audio-attack / release
motion.value: 1.6s exponential in / 0.55s exponential out on the master gain

motion.name: strings-entry
motion.value: oscillators scheduled at t+3s, 2.8s linear swell — three seconds late, on purpose

motion.name: drone-weather
motion.value: LFOs at 0.07Hz (filter ±320Hz) and 0.11Hz (swell ±0.24) — never still, never looping audibly

motion.name: credit-roll
motion.value: scroll-scrubbed: translateY(calc(80svh − p × (80svh + 100%))) across a 300vh corridor
